trackingState.note: Lead conversion tracking intentionally off until 10-15 quality leads

headline_state: Finalized 2026-06-08 via buckshot-dashboard-daily orchestrator (single daily pass, non-Monday: adGroups/keywords carried forward). Day-of 2026-06-08: 1 qualified form(s), 0 OOA, 289 spam/test; 0 LSA call(s) (0 charged). Cumulative since Apr 1: 469 forms (33 qualified, 3 OOA, 433 spam/test) / 9 LSA (5 charged); combined 478 touches, 42 qualified. Ads w7 $1321.14 ($188.73/day), w30 $2378.57, 90d $6862.38 (435 clicks, 5 conversions). GA4 carried forward from 2026-06-04 (missing permissions on operator account).

insights.headline: One active campaign carries all spend
insights.body: Leads - Roofing (PC) is the only active campaign; the other 5 are paused. 90-day account spend is $6862.38 across 435 clicks and 5 conversions.

insights.headline: 7-day pace runs hot versus 30-day
insights.body: Last 7 days cost $1321.14 ($188.73/day) at $50.81 CPC, well above the 30-day pace of $79.29/day at $27.66 CPC.

insights.headline: Conversion tracking still intentionally off
insights.body: Lead-goal tracking remains off; the account shows only 5 phone-call conversions over 90 days from the Call-from-Ads goal.

insights.headline: Spam floods the form channel
insights.body: Day-of 2026-06-08 logged 289 spam/test form submissions (a large automated test flood across multiple CF7 forms) versus 1 qualified, underscoring weak form spam defenses.

insights.headline: LSA drives the qualified pipeline
insights.body: Cumulative since Apr 1: 9 LSA calls (5 charged) alongside 33 qualified forms; combined 42 qualified touches.

insights.headline: Cost per qualified holds near target
insights.body: At $6862.38 90-day spend over 42 qualified touches, cost per qualified lead is ~$163.

insights.headline: Optimization score is strong
insights.body: Account optimization score is 94.6% with no active bid warnings flagged this run.

ads-nonmonday-carryforward: adGroups (active-campaign view) and keywords carried forward unchanged from prior current.json; 5 of 6 campaigns paused so 90-day detail near-static. Full re-scrape only on Mondays (IST). 6 campaign rows + windows + cost90d + adsDaily captured fresh.

spam-flood: Day-of 2026-06-08 saw an automated test-submission flood of 289 entries (test@test.com, '[your-subject]') across FAQ/Insurance Partners/Warranty/AMadison/etc. CF7 forms, all classified spamTest; inflates cumulative spam to 433.
